full_text:
Zheng Tai (Gongye) 鄭泰 (公業)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Tai (鄭泰), styledGongye (公業), was born in Henan. Opposed inviting Dong to capital. Advised Dong Zhuo not to conscript too many troops. Zheng Tai was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, and Yuan Shu. Zheng Tai lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
